args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY ownerid;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY ownerid;

args.query:
SELECT newvalue__c AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 0;

exec_args.sql:

FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'Owner' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY newvalue__c
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 0;

             ^

[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS case_count

GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 0;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS case_count
FROM Case c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 0;

exec_args.sql:

FROM Case c
WHERE c.createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND c.createddate < '2023-04-11'
GROUP BY c.ownerid
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) > 0;

args.query:

FROM "Case"

GROUP BY ownerid

result.preview: "There are no recorded owner transfer events in the case history for the last 4 quarters (2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10), so no agent has a non-zero transfer count. Therefore, no agent satisfies the condition of having handled more than 0 cases and having the fewest transfer counts greater than or equal to zero."
